title: Jer'usk
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:TheresAlwaysABiggerToxicMutantFish-GSE.jpg|thumb]]
'''Jer'uskae''' (singular "'''jer'usk'''"), also called '''widowmakers''', were oceanic predators native to [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]] that could grow up to 75 meters long. They engaged in breeching to stun surrounding prey.

{{Creature-stub}}

*<!-- 1995-01-XX -->''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]''
